creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed, thanks!

Note that LICENSE defined in the port may be incorrect: while README mentions APACHE20, LICENSE and code actually mention APACHE11. I've filed an issue for this ambiguity to be resolved:

https://github.com/maxmind/geoip-api-mod_geoip2/issues/19

so please keep that in mind and fix the license with the next update if it should really be APACHE11. It is also preferred to have LICENSE_FILE.
